selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 熊；vt. 忍受, 支承, 产生, 怀有, 通过卖空使跌价
words.definition: n. massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 狼, 残忍贪婪之人, 极度穷困；vt. 狼吞虎咽, 大吃
words.definition: n. any of various predatory carnivorous canine mammals of North America and Eurasia that usually hunt in packs

words.translation: a. 极大的, 巨大的, 无限的
words.definition: s. unusually great in size or amount or degree or especially extent or scope

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: n. 声音, 嗓音, 嗓子, 愿望, 发言权, 表达, 喉舌, 语态；vt. 表达, 吐露, 调音
words.definition: n. the distinctive quality or pitch or condition of a person's speech

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 盆, 罐, 壶, 坩埚, 奖杯；vt. 装入盆中, 在锅中煮, 随手射击
words.definition: n. metal or earthenware cooking vessel that is usually round and deep; often has a handle and lid

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 蛋糕, 块, 饼；vt. 使结块, 加块状物于
words.definition: n. a block of solid substance (such as soap or wax)

words.translation: n. 了不起的人, 大人物；pron. 有人, 某人
prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 葡萄酒, 果酒, 暗红色；v. (请)喝酒
words.definition: n. fermented juice (of grapes especially)

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: a. acting or moving or capable of acting or moving quickly

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 法院, 庭院, 奉承；vt. 献殷勤, 追求, 招致
words.definition: n. an assembly (including one or more judges) to conduct judicial business

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 秒, 瞬间, 第二名, 支持者, 助手；a. 第二的, 其次的, 次要的, 附加的, 辅助的
words.definition: n. 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的

words.translation: n. 灰色；a. 灰色的, 阴沉的
words.definition: n. United States writer of western adventure novels (1875-1939)

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下
words.definition: n. term of address for a man

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
n. 瓶子, 酒瓶；vt. 装瓶, 抑制, 围困
words.definition: n. a glass or plastic vessel used for storing drinks or other liquids; typically cylindrical without handles and with a narrow neck that can be plugged or cappe

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒
words.definition: n. a single serving of a beverage

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个

words.translation: n. 下巴, 颏

words.translation: n. 拇指；vt. 以拇指拨弄, 笨拙地摆弄, 用拇指翻旧, 迅速翻阅, 作搭车手势

words.translation: n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延

words.translation: n. 粗糙的东西, 毛坯, 未加工品, 梗概, 草图, 暴徒, 艰难；a. 粗糙的, 粗暴的, 蓬乱的, 草率的, 大致的, 简陋的, 暴风雨的, 艰难的

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
